full_text:
Hou Yi 后羿
ARomance of the Three KingdomsEncyclopedia officer profile.
Hou Yi (后羿). Xia dynasty period. Of the Youqiong tribe. Famous archer. Hou Yi was affiliated with Youqiong Tribe.
